description_long: A male adult is depicted in a dynamic crouching pose, as if moving stealthily or preparing to spring forward. He is dressed in a fitted business suit with a collared shirt and tie, and a distinctive armband on his upper left arm. The figure's right hand is gripping a small object resembling a handgun, held close to the ground, while his left knee is bent and nearly touching the surface. His facial features are clean-cut, and his hair is neatly styled. The base is a simple, flat circular platform, suggesting the figure is intended for display or as part of a diorama.
description: A crouching adult male in a business suit with an armband, holding a handgun and posed on a circular base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the crouched posture, bent left knee, and the handgun held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the determined facial expression, armband, and both hands gripping the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the back of the suit jacket and the extended right leg.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the head, suit jacket, and the trailing edge of the coat.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and tie, armband on upper arm
attribute_posture: crouching with one knee bent and one leg extended
